BODYGUARD_REWORK.title: Bodyguard
NEGATIVE_PULSE_REWORK.title: Negative Pulse
NEGATIVE_PULSE_REWORK.description: Gain 7 [gold]Block[/gold]. NL Apply 7 [gold]Doom[/gold] to ALL enemies. NL [gold]Summon[/gold] 1.
CAPTURE_SPIRIT_REWORK.title: Capture Spirit
CAPTURE_SPIRIT_REWORK.description: Enemy loses 3 HP. NL Add 3 [gold]Souls[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. NL [gold]Summon[/gold] 2.
TIMES_UP_REWORK.title: Time's Up
TIMES_UP_REWORK.description: Deal damage equal to the enemy's [gold]Doom[/gold]. NL [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. NL [Upgraded] Kill if [gold]Doom[/gold] >= HP.
